# netbox_tenant (Data Source)

Fetches a single tenant from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single tenant by ID.
data "netbox_tenant" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "tenant_name" {
  value = data.netbox_tenant.example.name
}

output "tenant_slug" {
  value = data.netbox_tenant.example.slug
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the tenant.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the tenant.
- `name` (String) Name of the tenant.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the tenant.
